meta.title: STOP Wasting Credits & Master Kling 3.0 in 25 Minutes
meta.description:
Full Kling AI 3.0 Tutorial - Become a pro Kling 3.0 User 
Try Kling 3.0 here 👉 https://openart.ai/suite/home?ref=klingAI3

In this Tutorial I show you how to Master Kling 3.0 - the newest AI video generator from Kling Ai, so you're no longer wasting any credits. I will walk you through Kling 3.0 Multi-shot, I breakdown all the new features and I give you tips and tricks on how to make better videos with it. 

Join my FREE community where you can find my prompts, custom GPT  & chat about AI
👉 https://www.skool.com/nextgenai


Timestamps
00:00 Intro
00:50 How To get Access to Kling 3.0
01:08 New Kling AI Features break down
02:35 How To Prompt on Kling 3.0
03:31 Kling 3.0 Multishot explained
05:25 Custom Meta prompting GPT 
06:41 Kling 3.0 Text to video explained
08:15 Kling 3.0 text to video multishot
09:39 Kling 3.0 Reference to video
14:58 Kling 3.0 image to video
18:12 is Kling 3.0 worth the hype?
22:24 Limitations of kling 3.0


📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
